package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_mixes_html_json_and_file_responses: Handlers that serve fundamentally different transport modes from one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule045NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule045NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule045NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario045Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule045NegativeService, input Rule045NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
